ddls:
CREATE TABLE "interactions" (
  "interaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each interaction */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the device used in the interaction */,
  "screen_size" TEXT /* Screen size of the device */,
  "published_time" TEXT /* UTC time when the interaction was published */,
  "local_published_time" TEXT /* Local time when the interaction was published */,
  "session_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the session during which the interaction occurred */,
  "environment_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the environment in which the interaction occurred */,
  "interaction_type" TEXT /* Type of interaction (e.g., Request, Close, Click) */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device */,
  "object_type" TEXT /* Type of object interacted with (e.g., MessageTemplate, Conversation, RecommendationItem) */,
  "event_name" TEXT /* Name of the event triggered by the interaction */,
  "event_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the event */,
  "ad_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the advertisement involved in the interaction */,
  "click_coordinates" TEXT /* Coordinates of the click on the advertisement */,
  "scroll_depth" REAL /* Depth of scroll on the advertisement */,
  "engagement_time" REAL /* Time spent engaging with the advertisement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("interaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_interactions_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES devices ("device_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_interactions_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES sessions ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_interactions_user_agent FOREIGN KEY ("user_agent") REFERENCES devices ("user_agent"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_interactions_event_name FOREIGN KEY ("event_name") REFERENCES event_types ("event_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_interactions_environment_id FOREIGN KEY ("environment_id") REFERENCES environments ("environment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_interactions_object_type FOREIGN KEY ("object_type") REFERENCES object_types ("object_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "devices" (
  "device_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each device */,
  "is_bot" INTEGER /* Indicator of whether the device is a bot */,
  "device_name" TEXT /* Name of the device */,
  "device_model" TEXT /* Model of the device */,
  "operating_system" TEXT /* Operating system of the device */,
  "browser_type" TEXT /* Type of browser used on the device */,
  "browser_version" TEXT /* Version of the browser used on the device */,
  "screen_resolution" TEXT /* Screen resolution of the device */,
  "device_idfa" TEXT /* Device IDFA (Identifier for Advertisers) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("device_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "environments" (
  "environment_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each environment */,
  "environment_name" TEXT /* Name of the environment */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the environment */,
  "environment_type" TEXT /* Type of environment (e.g., production, staging) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("environment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sessions" (
  "session_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each session */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the session */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the session */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the session in seconds */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user associated with the session */,
  "session_type" TEXT /* Type of session (e.g., logged-in, guest) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sessions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., customer, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "object_types" (
  "object_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each object type */,
  "object_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the object type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the object type */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the object type (e.g., message, conversation) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("object_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_types" (
  "event_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event type */,
  "event_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the event type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the event type */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the event type (e.g., click, close) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ads" (
  "ad_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each advertisement */,
  "ad_name" TEXT /* Name of the advertisement */,
  "campaign_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the campaign the ad belongs to */,
  "ad_format" TEXT /* Format of the advertisement */,
  "placement" TEXT /* Placement of the advertisement */,
  "target_audience" TEXT /* Target audience for the advertisement */,
  "ad Creative" TEXT /* Creative assets for the advertisement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ad_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ads_campaign_id FOREIGN KEY ("campaign_id") REFERENCES campaigns ("campaign_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "campaigns" (
  "campaign_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each campaign */,
  "campaign_name" TEXT /* Name of the campaign */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the campaign */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the campaign */,
  "budget" REAL /* Budget allocated to the campaign */,
  "objective" TEXT /* Objective of the campaign */,
  "targeting_criteria" TEXT /* Targeting criteria for the campaign (e.g., demographics, interests) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("campaign_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ad_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance record */,
  "ad_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the advertisement */,
  "impressions" INTEGER /* Number of times the ad was displayed */,
  "clicks" INTEGER /* Number of times the ad was clicked */,
  "conversions" INTEGER /* Number of conversions resulting from the ad */,
  "revenue" REAL /* Revenue generated by the ad */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date for which the performance metrics are recorded */,
  "ctr" REAL /* Click-through rate (CTR) */,
  "cpc" REAL /* Cost per click (CPC) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ad_performance_ad_id FOREIGN KEY ("ad_id") REFERENCES ads ("ad_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_profiles" (
  "profile_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user profile */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the user */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the user */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the user */,
  "interests" TEXT /* List of interests of the user */,
  "behavioral_data" TEXT /* Behavioral data about the user (e.g., browsing history) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("profile_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_profiles_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "segmentation" (
  "segment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each segment */,
  "segment_name" TEXT /* Name of the segment */,
  "criteria" TEXT /* Criteria used for segmentation */,
  "users" TEXT /* List of user IDs in the segment */,
  "segment_type" TEXT /* Type of segment (e.g., demographic, behavioral) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("segment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_segmentation_users FOREIGN KEY ("users") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audiences" (
  "audience_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audience */,
  "audience_name" TEXT /* Name of the audience */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the audience */,
  "targeting_criteria" TEXT /* Targeting criteria for the audience (e.g., demographics, interests) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audience_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ad_creatives" (
  "creative_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each creative asset */,
  "ad_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the advertisement */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the image creative */,
  "video_url" TEXT /* URL of the video creative */,
  "headline" TEXT /* Headline of the creative */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the creative */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("creative_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ad_creatives_ad_id FOREIGN KEY ("ad_id") REFERENCES ads ("ad_id")
)
